description:
Limit the MACs to those hash algorithms which are FIPS-approved. The following line in /etc/ssh/ssh_config demonstrates use of FIPS-approved MACs: 
MACs
If this line does not contain these MACs in exact order, is commented out, or is missing, this is a finding.
rationale:
DoD Information Systems are required to use FIPS-approved cryptographic hash
functions. The only hash algorithms meeting this requirement is SHA2.
ocil_clause: MACs option is commented out or not using FIPS-approved hash algorithms
ocil:
Only FIPS-approved MACs should be used. To verify that only FIPS-approved MACs are in use, run the following command: 
$ sudo grep -ir macs /etc/ssh/ssh_config /etc/ssh/ssh_config.d
The output should contain only following MACs: 
MACs

warnings.general: The system needs to be rebooted for these changes to take effect.

title: Use Only FIPS 140-3 Validated MACs
